name: Deadly Zombie Breath
effectText: If you control a Zombie monster and "Call of the Haunted": Target 1 monster your opponent controls; send it to the GY. If you control a Zombie monster: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 face-up card you control and 1 face-up card your opponent controls; send them to the GY. You can only use 1 "Deadly Zombie Breath" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
